title: InstrumentEligibility
description: Full trading configuration for a single instrument, including position limits, trading permissions, order configuration, margin settings, and available leverage.

symbol.description: Trading symbol of the instrument (e.g. AAPL, EURUSD).

minPositionExposure.description: Minimum exposure value required to open a position on this instrument.

maxUnitsPerOrder.description: Maximum number of units allowed per single order.

allowOpenPosition.description: Whether opening new positions is currently permitted.

allowClosePosition.description: Whether closing existing positions is currently permitted.

allowPartialClosePosition.description: Whether partially closing an existing position is permitted.

allowEntryOrders.description: Whether submitting open orders when the market is closed is allowed.

allowExitOrders.description: Whether submitting close orders when the market is closed is allowed.

allowTrailingStopLoss.description: Whether a trailing stop-loss can be set on positions for this instrument.

requiresW8Ben.description: Whether a W-8BEN tax form is required to trade this instrument. Null if not applicable.

unitsQuantityType.description: What trade quantity type is allowed. Possible values: `WholeUnits`, `FractionalUnits`.

orderFillBehaviorType.description: How orders are filled for this instrument. Possible values: `BestEffort`, `FillOrKill`.

allowedOrderQuantityType.description: How order size can be specified. Possible values: `Units`, `Amount`, `Both`.

tradeUnitType.description: Unit type used to express trade size. Possible values: `Units`, `Lots`.

initialMarginInAssetCurrency.description: Initial margin expressed in the asset currency. Null if not applicable.

stopLossMarginInAssetCurrency.description: Stop-loss margin expressed in the asset currency. Null if not applicable.

additionalBufferPercent.description: Additional buffer applied to the current rate to limit the order execution price - usually for low-liquidity assets. This also causes additional funds to be reserved for the order. Null if no buffer.

leverageConfigs.description: Available leverage configurations, each specific to a settlement type and direction.
